zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Berkeley於1466年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley30歲，母親Isabel Meade23歲。他於大約1488年與Lady Susan FitzAlan在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1515年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Berkeley于1466年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley30岁，母亲Isabel Meade23岁。他于大约1488年与Lady Susan FitzAlan在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1515年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Berkeley was born in 1466, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, was 30 and his mother, Isabel Meade, was 23. He married Lady Susan FitzAlan about 1488, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1515, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Berkeley est né en 1466, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Meade, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Susan FitzAlan environ 1488, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1515, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Berkeley 1466 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley 30 und seine Mutter Isabel Meade 23. Er hat um 1488 in Gloucestershire, England Lady Susan FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1515 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Berkeley è nato il nel 1466 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Meade, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Susan FitzAlan circa 1488, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1515, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Berkeleyが1466年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeleyは30歳，母Isabel Meadeは23歳であった。約1488年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでLady Susan FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1515年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで49歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Berkeley(이)가 1466년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Meade(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1488년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Lady Susan FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1515년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Berkeley nasceu em 1466, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Meade, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Susan FitzAlan aproximadamente 1488, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1515, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Berkeley родился в 1466 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Meade, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Susan FitzAlan около 1488 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1515 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Berkeley nació en 1466, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabel Meade, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Susan FitzAlan aproximadamente 1488, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1515, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
